title: DHPack
description: A .dhpack content pack for the Encounter app. Accepts either a pack wrapper object (recommended) or a bare adversary array (seansbox/daggerheart-srd export format).

oneOf.description: Bare adversary array — seansbox/daggerheart-srd direct export format.

PackWrapper.description: Recommended top-level structure. Supports adversaries, environments, or both.

adversaries.description: Array of adversary objects to import.

environments.description: Array of environment objects to import.

id.description: URL-safe slug, e.g. 'iron-golem'. Auto-derived from name if absent.

source.description: Pack name, author, or 'homebrew'. Stored lowercase.

tier.description: PC level tier 1–4 this adversary is designed for.

type.description: Adversary role. Horde variant strings like 'Horde (3/HP)' are normalized to 'Horde' on import.

motives_and_tactics.description: GM-facing guidance on how to run this adversary.

difficulty.description: DC for all player rolls against this adversary.

thresholds.description: Combined major/severe threshold string, e.g. '8/15'. Use 'None' for minions with no damage thresholds. Provide either this field or threshold_major + threshold_severe.

threshold_major.description: Pre-split alternative to thresholds. Damage required for a Major hit.

threshold_severe.description: Pre-split alternative to thresholds. Damage required for a Severe hit.

attack.description: Name of the standard attack or weapon.

damage.description: Damage expression, e.g. '1d12+2 phy' or '2d6 mag'.

Environment.description: A Daggerheart environment — a scene element with features but no HP or Stress.

id.description: URL-safe slug. Auto-derived from name if absent.

source.description: Pack name or author. Stored lowercase.

feature.description: Passives, reactions, and actions this environment contributes to the scene.

Feature.description: A named action, reaction, or passive on an adversary or environment.

name.description: Unique name within this adversary or environment. May include a ' - Type' suffix (e.g. 'Bite - Action') to allow feat_type to be inferred.

feat_type.description: Feature category. If absent, inferred from a ' - Action' or ' - Reaction' suffix in name; defaults to 'passive'.

IntOrNumericString.description: Accepts either a JSON integer or a string containing an integer, for compatibility with SRD tooling that serializes all numeric fields as strings.
